markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 504. License Plates
##### § 504.948 — General Penalty

(a) A person commits an offense if the person violates a provision of this chapter and no other penalty is prescribed for the violation.

(b) An offense under Subsection (a) is a misdemeanor punishable by a fine of not less than $5 or more than $200.

*Added by Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1135 (H.B.2741), Sec. 84, eff. June 14, 2013.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: A person commits an offense if the person violates a provision of this chapter and no other penalty is prescribed for the violation.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: An offense under Subsection (a) is a misdemeanor punishable by a fine of not less than $5 or more than $200.
